rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: niivu cennaagi maataadoo varege kaannada kaliibeeku.
rows.english: You have to learn Kannada till you speak well.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If so, how many months should I learn ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: You have to learn for four months.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I will learn for six months.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: ninne klaas mugid meele ellig hoodri ?
rows.english: Where did you go after the class yesterday ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: naanu klaass mugidmeele sabhege hoode, niiyu ?
rows.english: After the class, I want to the meeting and you ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: naanu klaas mugid meele haastalge hoode.
rows.english: I went to the hostel after the class was over.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: What were you doing after going to the hostel?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: haalu kudde. haalu kudidmeele nidde baroovarge oottidde.
rows.english: I drank milk. After drinking milk, I was reading until I got sleep.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: ninne niivu estu gante varege oottiddri?
rows.english: Yesterday till what time were you studying ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I was reading till the master came.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Did you go to bed after he left ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: illa, avaru hood meeluu solpa oottidde.
rows.english: No, I was reading for some time even after he left.
